definition:
Λευεί (indecl.) and Λευείς (Rec. -υΐ, -υΐς), genitive Λευεί, accusative -είν, ὁ (Heb. H3878) 
 Levi; 
   1. the son of Jacob: Heb.7:5, 9, Rev.7:7. 
   2. Son of Melchi: Luk.3:24. 
   3. Son of Simeon: Luk.3:29. 
   4. Son of Alphæus (cf. Μαθθαῖος): Mrk.2:14 (WH, mg., Ἰάκωβον), Luk.5:27, 29.†
 (AS)
